verifications.evidence: FGAP-035 closure verified at HEAD e88d7ee. Implementer commit f17efa3 applied 11 cascade-target rows verbatim; follow-up commit e88d7ee dropped 12th forbidden-phrase site at project-dir.ts:44 (BootstrapNotFoundError JSDoc) surfaced by adversarial probe. Post-commit greps: `grep -rn '= PROJECT_DIR' packages/pi-context/src/` returns 0; `grep -rn '".project"' packages/pi-context/src/ --include="*.ts" | grep -v .test.ts | grep -v project-dir.ts` returns 0; forbidden JSDoc-framing phrases grep across project-dir.ts + index.ts returns 0. TypeScript negative-demo confirms writeBootstrapPointer signature change (Expected 2 arguments, but got 1). Round-trip positive-demo confirms cascade-through-pointer works with caller-supplied non-default contextDir. Test counts post-commit (via husky pre-commit hook landing): pi-context 401/0/0; pi-jit-agents 150/0/1; pi-workflows 824/0/2; pi-behavior-monitors 157/0/0. Adversarial probe verdict: 9 PASS / 1 INCONCLUSIVE (Q10 husky-test-log not persisted; substantively PASS — exit-code IS verification). FGAP-035 closed; TASK-021 phase-1 acceptance criterion 4 met via prior 1.3.A read-config/read-schema tools.

verifications.evidence: compile-task-context.ts landed at commits 7883cea (creation) + 5293cca (console.log normalization) + e3a0247 (renamed from build-task-template.ts to compile-task-context.ts mirroring pi-jit-agents compileAgent vocabulary). Acceptance criterion 7 (FGAP-035 implementation context compiled via this script) validated end-to-end: compile-task-context.ts produced compiled-contexts/task-block-fgap035.md; that task-block fed into compile-implementation-context.ts which produced compiled-contexts/implementation-fgap035-rendered-context.md (472 lines); implementer agent (general-purpose) consumed the rendered context and committed f17efa3 applying all 11 cascade-target rows + e88d7ee for the 12th forbidden-phrase site. Script renders implementer task-block from substrate inputs (TASK-NNN id + explore-report path + commit-subject); reads task entry from .project/tasks.json via @davidorex/pi-context/block-api readBlock; extracts cascade-target table from explore-report via extract-markdown-section.ts; emits XML-structured task-block in shape compile-implementation-context.ts expects.

verifications.evidence: inject-context-items.ts landed at commit 2c3794a (creation); --context-items arg integration into compile-{explore,implementation}-context.ts at ad02726. Acceptance criterion 7 (FGAP-035 Explore re-dispatch uses --context-items framework-gaps:FGAP-035,tasks:TASK-031,decisions:DEC-0015) validated end-to-end: the rendered explore context at compiled-contexts/explore-fgap035-rendered-context.md embeds <context_items> with all three items verbatim; Explore agent dispatched against that context produced compiled-contexts/explore-fgap035-canonical-v2.md with 11 cascade-target rows; implementer agent dispatched against the downstream implementation context (which re-injected same three items) committed the fix without OR-hedging in any Required-change cell. Substrate items composed via extension tools into JIT-agent-shaped context per DEC-0014 substrate-IS-operating-surface principle. Schema-shape friction points filed inline: array_key heuristic (single-top-level-array discovery); id-field assumption; singleton-block-shape gap; colon-escape selector gap — all documented in script JSDoc + commit body 2c3794a per dogfood discipline.
